description_long: This is a rectangular, upright juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' and 'PREMIUM COCKTAIL JUICE' on a white background with gold accents. The front of the carton features vibrant images of assorted fruits, including a pineapple, banana, apple, blueberries, and grapes, suggesting a mixed fruit juice flavor. The top of the carton is fitted with a white plastic screw cap, slightly offset to one side for easy pouring. The sides of the carton display the brand name vertically and additional product information, while the back contains a detailed nutritional information panel in multiple languages. The packaging appears to be made of laminated cardboard, typical for juice cartons, with a glossy finish. The overall design is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for display in urban retail environments.
description: A white and gold juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' with images of assorted fruits and a white screw cap. The packaging is sleek, glossy, and features detailed branding and nutritional information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label, fruit illustrations, and the white screw cap on top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and part of the fruit illustration, with the cap visible at the top.
description_view_2: Back view featuring the nutritional information panel and multilingual product details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and a partial view of the fruit illustration and cap.
